title: ononis spinosa var. intermedia
intro: Ononis spinosa var. intermedia, also known as the Spiny Restharrow or Intermediate Restharrow, is a subspecies of the Spiny Restharrow plant, belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as its ability to support the digestive system and promote wound healing. Ononis spinosa var. intermedia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves, stems, and roots are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
